title: Professional Liability
definition: This policy is intended for professionals who provide service and cover the insured from losses that may result from professional malpractice. For businesses that deal with advisory services, the cover will compensate for losses arising due to errors and/or omissions.
benefits: The policy is designed to indemnify the insured against any claim or claims first made to the insured for breach of professional duty as stated in the schedule, which may be made by reason of any negligent act, error, or omission whenever or wherever.
eligibility: Please contact Old Mutual Uganda for detailed eligibility and application requirements.
